description: A political reporter is responsible for covering election results as they come in.

nodes.task_description: Monitor the official election results feed from the state election board.

expected_outcome.value: Agent has a reliable, primary source for results.

nodes.task_description: As results come in for key races, update a data visualization on the website showing the new totals.

expected_outcome.value: The website's graphics are kept up-to-date in real time.

nodes.task_description: When a major race is called by the decision desk, write a breaking news alert and a short article.

expected_outcome.value: News about the race outcome is published immediately.
